programs.desc: Howard and Bernadette are disappointed when they find out the sex of the baby. Leonard is annoyed when his mother befriends Penny.

programs.title: Friends
programs.desc: Disappointed to learn that they cannot conceive a baby naturally, Monica and Chandler mull their options. Meanwhile, while shopping with Phoebe, Rachel confides that she is in love with Joey.
